blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,166 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.8" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 41".
